message:
fix: reduce visual noise — suppress session_start/end/plan_start in TUI

- session_start: null (app opening IS the session start)
- session_end: null (prompt returning IS the signal)
- plan_start: null (input area shows "..." while running)
- Status bar: hide "to compact" at <50% context, fix "1 turns" grammar
- String renderer: fix "N turns" → "1 turn" singular
- Update tests to use perceive/warning events instead of session_start

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
